description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a medium build, depicted in a casual urban outfit. He wears a short-sleeved crew neck shirt and straight-cut pants, paired with slip-on shoes. The figure's arms are slightly extended outward, and his hands are relaxed with fingers naturally splayed. His hair is short and neatly styled, with a side part and some volume on top. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for a city or neighborhood environment. The figure's proportions and posture suggest a relaxed, approachable demeanor.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure with a short-sleeved shirt, straight pants, slip-on shoes, and neatly styled short hair, standing with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and full details of the shirt and pants, with arms and hands visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, nose, and the side seam of the clothing, with one arm and leg fully visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head and body, with the right arm and leg in focus.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
